summary: The diff implements Internet Identity authentication as required by REQ-8. All major acceptance criteria appear to be addressed: unauthenticated users see only the login page (App.tsx), a 'Login with Internet Identity' button is present (LoginPage.tsx referenced in file summaries), successful login redirects to messaging layout, first-time users see a profile setup modal, and logout is accessible from MessagingLayout. Returning authenticated users are auto-directed via the identity check in App.tsx. No missing requirements or hallucinated features are identified.
